zh.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent是Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent和Brigantine de Montfort的女兒，於0969年出生在法國諾門迪艾艾福。她與Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1022年在法國豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent是Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent和Brigantine de Montfort的女儿，于0969年出生在法国諾門迪艾艾福。她与Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1022年在法国豪-諾門迪艾蒙特福吉素-利斯爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Esperon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Esperón): habitational name from any of the places called Esperón in A Coruña and Pontevedra provinces, in Galicia (Spain), derived from áspera ‘rough’, referring to the quality of land.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nogent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin), and northern French: habitational name from any of several places in northern France, such as Nogent-le-Sec and Nogent-sur-Eure (both in Eure), Nogent-le-Phaye, Nogent-le-Roi, and Nogent-le-Rotrou (all in Eure-et-Loir), Nogent-l'Abbesse (Marne), Nogent-l'Artaud (Aisne), and in particular Nogent-sur-Oise (Oise), named with Latin Novientum, apparently an altered form of a Gaulish name meaning ‘new settlement’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name, but it was also adopted for Mag Uinseanáin (formerly Anglicized as McGunshenan, a variant of Gilsenan ), on the grounds of a fancied resemblance between Uinseanán and Uinnseadún.

History: The Anglo-Norman family of this name is descended from Fulke de Bellesme, lord of Nogent in Normandy, who was granted large estates around Winchester after the Conquest. His great-grandson was Hugh de Nugent (died 1213), who went to Ireland with Hugh de Lacy, and was granted lands in Bracklyn, County Westmeath. The family formed itself into a clan on the Irish model, of which the chief bore the hereditary title of Uinsheadun (Irish Uinnseadún), from their original seat at Winchester. They have been Earls of Westmeath since 1621. The name is now a common one in Ireland, and has been adopted there by some who have no connection with the clan.

variants.name: Newgent
meanings: Irish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Nugent  .

variants.name: Nugen
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Nugent  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilsenan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colm.

Irish (Meath): shortened form of MacGils(h)enan, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Seanáin ‘son of the servant or devotee of Saint Senan’. Gilsenan has sometimes been Anglicized as Gilson , and a northern Irish variant Mag Uinseanáin, formerly Anglicized as McGunshenan, has now been replaced by Nugent . Leonard has also sometimes been adopted as equivalent.

nameMeanings.name: Albreda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Elfreda  , but now probably taken as a feminine equivalent of   Alfred .

en.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent was born in 0969, in Évreux, Eure, Normandy, France as the daughter of Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent and Brigantine de Montfort. She married Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1022, in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent est née en 0969, à Évreux, Eure, Normandie, France, fille de Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent et Brigantine de Montfort. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1022, à Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent wurde 0969 in Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich, als Tochter von Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent und Brigantine de Montfort geboren. Sie hat in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1022 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent è nata il nel 0969 nel Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia come figlia di Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent e Brigantine de Montfort. Lei sposato Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1022, nel Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogentは0969年にフランスノーマンディエウアevレウックスでRotrou, Seigneur de NogentとBrigantine de Montfortの娘として生まれた。フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスでGuillaume de Montfort-Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1022年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアモントフォート-スル-リスルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent(은)는 0969년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent(와)과 Brigantine de Montfort의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1022년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 몽포트-수-리슬일에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent nasceu em 0969, em Évreux, Eure, Normandie, França filha de Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent e Brigantine de Montfort. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1022, em Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent родилась в 0969 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, норманди, Франция. Её родителей звали Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent и Brigantine de Montfort. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1022 г. в местности монтфорт-сур-рисл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent nació en 0969, en Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia como hija de Rotrou, Seigneur de Nogent y Brigantine de Montfort. Se casó con Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1022, en Montfort-sur-Risle, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
